category_sources: source_facts.description says Digital Mars D compiler; official dlang/dmd README says DMD is the reference compiler for the D programming language.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses DMD; source_facts.description expands it as Digital Mars D compiler.
docs_sources: Official dlang.org DMD page documents compiler installation and command-line reference; official API docs and repository README provide related documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/dlang/dmd, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repo values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable; official dlang/dmd README identifies DMD as the D reference compiler and lists compiler/language topics.
